title: AI spending boom may keep US inflation and interest rates elevated: Jefferies Report
description: The ongoing surge in artificial intelligence (AI)-related spending could keep inflation elevated in the United States and force interest rates to remain higher for longer, according to Jefferies' latest Greed & Fear report.

title: Natural gas key to Alberta’s AI ambitions, Premier says

title: How To Spot the Red Flags Of Artificial Intelligence Scams
description: As cybercriminals increasingly rely on artificial intelligence to build speed, scale, and deeply personalized messages, online scams are becoming far more convincing.

title: AI can improve lives, Nvidia chief says

title: Google, FBI target Chinese scammers using Gemini AI for fake sites
description: Tech giant Google has joined forces with the FBI to dismantle a Chinese cybercrime syndicate known as "Outsider Enterprise" after the group allegedly used Google's own Gemini artificial intelligence to create fraudulent websites and swindle users out of millions of dollars.

title: Tech workers maxed out their AI use. Now they’re trying to minimise it
description: Many companies are discovering that artificial intelligence is expensive to use. So begins a new era of cost savings.
content:
SAN FRANCISCO: Earlier this year, the message from tech companies to employees was clear: Use as much artificial intelligence in your work as possible.
